key.name: screensaver-mode
key.description: Choose the visual shown when the session is idle. Recognised scenes are 'flow' (the animated Ooze Flow lava-lamp backdrop), 'aurora' (drifting light curtains), 'nebula' (layered clouds with a starfield), and 'plasma' (a flowing interference field). Use 'none' to keep the desktop clear while retaining the normal lock-on-idle behavior.
